intendedProofShape: Two readable scopes are compared. An early deduction fixes part of one side, turning a comparison into later guest or no-guest pressure.
rejectIf: comparison uses the same scope on both sides
comparison is decorative and removing it preserves proof and final uniqueness
one side is already fully public in the opening state

metadata.author: room-axioms-maintainers
metadata.notes: Private Phase 26 template for comparative-count pressure that survives rule-contribution review.
